expect.note: Repo has 12 integration tests in tests/ (test_buf.rs, test_bytes.rs, etc.) plus a likely lib unit-test target; gazelle_rust should emit rust_test rules for these. Asserting at least one is discovered. serde/odd_alloc/vec_alloc tests are cfg/feature-gated and may be missing if features unmapped (anticipated risk).

Cargo feature flags (std/serde/extra-platforms), loom cfg-gated code, and doc tests in src/lib.rs are not run by rust_test and feature mapping by gazelle_rust 0.1.0 may be incomplete; some native integration tests (test_serde, odd/vec_alloc allocator-override tests) may fail to build or run. These are the repo's OWN tests, so we run them, but allow_nonzero given the maturity/feature risks. Predicted realistic tier is 2.
